stemHtml: Some states implement daylight saving time (sometimes referred to as summer time) by advancing the clocks 1 hour in spring. Which of the following options is an effect of this?

options.a: There is 1 hour of additional daylight per day.
options.b: There is 1 hour of reduced daylight per day.
options.c: The daylight is shifted towards later in the day.
options.d: The daylight is shifted towards earlier in the day.
